Issue Identified: Long H1, Missing H1, duplicate description, long description, short description, Missing description, long title, short title and missing canonicals.
Recommended Action: Resolve Onpage issues.

Issue Identified: Some pages lack a proper internal linking structure.
Recommended Action: Improve internal linking to strengthen page authority and enhance user navigation.

Issue Identified: Image filenames do not describe the image.
Recommended Action: Use descriptive, keyword-rich filenames.

Issue Identified: LLM.txt file is missing.
Recommended Action: Implement the LLM.txt file correctly to guide AI crawlers on how content can be accessed and used.

Issue Identified: Breadcrumb, FAQ schema is missing.
Recommended Action: Implement appropriate schema types (Breadcrumb, FAQ) and validate using Google’s Structured Data Testing Tool.

Issue Identified: Slow loading on mobile devices.
Recommended Action: Optimize images, enable caching, and minimize JavaScript.

Issue Identified: Poor LCP and FID scores impacting rankings.
Recommended Action: Optimize overall page speed and improve Core Web Vitals.

Issue Identified: CAPTCHA is missing.
Recommended Action: Implement mobile-friendly CAPTCHA and proper validation methods.

Issue Identified: Most brand misspellings are not recognized across AI models.
Recommended Action: Ensure consistent brand naming and map common misspellings to improve AI recognition.

Issue Identified: Non-branded queries are not recognized or addressed by AI platforms.
Recommended Action: Create AI-optimized content such as FAQs, how-to guides, and snippet-ready answers for niche queries to ensure AI platforms recognize and prioritize the brand.

Issue Identified: AI platforms fail to associate queries with relevant product or service context.
Recommended Action: Improve semantic signals and content relevance so AI platforms correctly match queries with services and improve visibility.

Issue Identified: Brand presence is limited due to a lack of external citations.
Recommended Action: Acquire more backlinks and brand mentions from trusted websites so AI platforms can easily discover and display the brand.

Issue Identified: All AI platforms missed the query completely.
Recommended Action: Identify what worked on responsive platforms and replicate those patterns to close visibility gaps across all AI platforms.
